title: PSball's Earth Mod
description: This mod aims to recreate Minecraft Earth.
body:
--Description--
This mod aims to add the features from Minecraft Earth. These features include (right now):
- The tappables, your main method of getting resources
- The mob variants, including the cows, sheep, pigs, chickens, rabbits, llamas, wolves, spiders, and zombies. All the variants are there, with the exception of the witches because I wasn't feeling up to making the hat; and the slimes because I didn't know how make them semi-transparent
- The map, which covers the vast majority of the Minecraft world and houses the tappables

--Reassurances--
The best part about it is it's legal, as it's not a 1:1 recreation of the original Minecraft Earth because the map isn't of the actual Earth and the GUI from the original game is missing. It's also legal because I don't plan to profit from it at all. The other best part about it is that it's never gonna go away, unlike the original Minecraft Earth.

--Future Plans--
- The adventures from the original Minecraft Earth
- The mob drops
- Rubies (They're actually free; maybe)
- Crafting methods that are more similar to the original Minecraft Earth
- The journal from the original Minecraft Earth (maybe)
- The achievements from the original Minecraft Earth
- The seasons from the original Minecraft Earth (maybe)
- The Nether with new tappables and mob variants
- The End with new tappables and mob variants
- Villages with new tappables
